---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Mirthless
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that you can't today?
Describe the integration scenario if relevant (message type, connector, workflow).

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why the proposed one is better.

## Prior Art

Does Mirth Connect / NextGen Connect (or another engine) do this? How? Link docs
if you have them — we keep the good concepts and redesign the rest for Node.js.

## Scope / Non-Goals

What is explicitly *out* of scope for this request? (Helps keep it YAGNI-friendly.)

## Additional Context

Mockups, links, or examples.
